name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: IJI – SHOUSEN JUTSU (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: PRACTICE – MYSTICAL PALM TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
A commonly used technique in shinobi hospitals, this minor but practical skill boosts a patient's narutal recovery. If the target starts complete bed rest within 1 hour of this technique's use, their HP recovery doubles during the rest period, and it is healed of 1 temporary Chakra coils damage. If it does not start resting, it recovers twice the amount of nonlethal damage in the hour after use of this technique. If it tries to rest but cannot sleep restfully (for example, because it has consumed a soldier pill recently), it can still recover half its level worth of HP if it performs no strenuous activities for six to eight hours.

Alternatively, this technique can be used as a Treat Injury check to restore HP or revive a @Condition[dazed;remove]{dazed}, @Condition[stunned;remove]{stunned} or @Condition[unconscious;remove]{unconscious} character without the need for a first aid kit. This technique cannot be used more than once per 24 hours on the same target.
